Work Orders Forecasting: * Developed and implemented a robust forecasting model for gas work orders, utilizing historical data spanning 8 years. * Successfully forecasted the number of work orders for various job codes and service areas over a 3-year horizon, aggregating data at a monthly level. * Conducted extensive exploratory data analysis (EDA) and seasonality assessments. * Performed model selection and selected the best model to improve accuracy. * Executed hyperparameter tuning to optimize model performance, resulting in more reliable forecasts. * Deployed the model via Google Cloud Run, ensuring automated monthly updates for continuous monitoring and adjustment. Customer Intent Model: * Designed and implemented a comprehensive pipeline to extract call metadata using the CallMiner Data API. * Automated data retrieval with Cloud Functions, running every 15 minutes to capture the latest metadata and store it in Google Cloud Storage. * Processed and curated the data to send relevant subsets to BigQuery via Pub/Sub for efficient querying and analysis. * Integrated call transcripts using Cloud Run services, leveraging the Gemini model to categorize each call by intent, enhancing our understanding of customer needs and improving service delivery. Soon to be a Happy Retiree!!!! Lawyer, Judge and Certified Project Manager with the ITIL and Program and Portfolio Management Certifications as well. IBM Champion and recipient of the 2017 Analytics Ambassador Award from the Utility Analytics Institute!! Experienced in several large Projects and programs for CNP Successfully managed the AMS Systems implementing the Smart Grid at CNP and served as a member of the Program Management Office Now I am the Director responsible for delivering data analytics for Electric. One of the greatest competitive differentiators any company can have is access to actionable "data you can trust" in an actionable time frame. The major obstacles to achieving this often include knowing which data points are important, collecting and merging data from a wide variety of sources, the cost to store and maintain all of this data, and then being able to present it to decision makers in an easy to consume and interactive manner. My goals are to work with internal organizations to understand their core business processes, what data is available surrounding those processes, what the minimum components are to make improvements, and then how to store, analyze and deliver this information for "data driven" decision support. Specialties: Program Management Analytics and Data Services

“I have worked with Jason for eight years on many IT projects and programs.  I first met Jason in June 2018 during his technical interview for a position in the HPE Converged Systems 700 program (CS700).  Jason immediately impressed me with his strong VMware acumen and technical discipline, and I subsequently recommended hiring him.  As a tactical engineering lead, I interacted with Jason frequently on engineering project tasks he was responsible for.  The CS700 was a factory-build solution, integrating HPE Servers, Storage, and Network with a full VMware implementation.  Jason initially started working on the solution's components but quickly became competent in the entire solution.
...
In 2018, Jason became the lead engineer for the newly formed QA team.  In this role, he and his team of five engineers in India and the US were responsible for the final test and release.  He developed and implemented a CI/CD pipeline and Agile sprint development cycles. This testing methodology allowed him to use a follow-the-sun QA strategy.  Running a QA team can be one of the most stressful roles in engineering development, having tight schedule deadlines and challenging defects. Still, Jason was always composed and capable of driving the test plans and managing defects with his team. In 2022, HPE transitioned to Green Lake as a service program, and Jason became a cloud engineer, expanding his skills to support the new cloud services used in the Green Lake platform.
...

# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.

Develop AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector

Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities

DataOps & Platform Reliability: Established CI/CD pipelines for dbt models using GitHub Actions with automated testing (150+ data quality tests), peer code reviews, and blue-green deployments ensuring zero-downtime releases. Implemented data quality framework using dbt tests and Great Expectations detecting schema drift, nulls, and referential integrity violations before production. Deployed Datadog monitoring for data pipelines tracking data freshness, completeness, and SLA adherence, reducing MTTR from 3 hours to 28 minutes (91% improvement). Reduced production data incidents by 62% (from 21/quarter to 8/quarter) through shift-left testing and automated observability. AI-Powered Conversational Analytics Platform: Spearheaded AI transformation of legacy BI dashboards (Tableau and Power BI) into intelligent, conversational analytics platform serving supply chain operations across procurement, inventory, and logistics domains. Implemented Atlan (2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader) as AI-native data catalog achieving 90%+ metadata accuracy and column-level lineage tracking. Built in-house "Ask" conversational AI capability + semantic layer achieving 83% query accuracy and 28% faster decision-making (McKinsey benchmark). Implemented MLOps pipeline for conversational AI using prompt versioning, A/B testing (champion/challenger prompts), and accuracy tracking to continuously improve query responses. Established AI governance framework documenting model risks (hallucinations, bias), human oversight controls, and EU AI Act Article 52 transparency requirements. Democratized data access for 200+ supply chain stakeholders, reducing analyst workload by 40% through automation. Azure Databricks & Lakehouse Architecture: Architected medallion lakehouse data models on Databricks Unity Catalog processing 8TB+ daily from SAP, Maximo, and supply chain systems. Enforced Unity Catalog-based governance for data security, lineage, and quality ensuring EU AI Act compliance.
...
AI-Powered Route Optimization & Fleet Intelligence: Architected AI-powered route optimization using TensorFlow and optimization algorithms achieving 20% fuel reduction, 25-75% faster route planning, and $312K year-one savings (100% ROI in 6 months). Built predictive maintenance ML models (XGBoost) with 89% accuracy detecting equipment failures 2-4 weeks in advance, reducing unplanned downtime by 35%. Implemented MLOps pipeline using MLflow for experiment tracking (40+ training runs), model versioning, and automated retraining on 30-day rolling windows. Deployed models via Azure ML REST APIs serving 450+ daily predictions at <120ms p99 latency with 99.6% uptime. Reduced false positive maintenance alerts by 38% (from 95/month to 59/month) through continuous model refinement and feedback loops. Salesforce Einstein AI Integration: Led integration of Salesforce Einstein GPT with Service Intake databases enabling predictive customer service analytics. Reduced average case resolution time by 45% through AI-assisted agent workflows. Multi-Cloud Analytics Platform: Pioneered bi-directional data interoperability between Microsoft Fabric and Snowflake using Apache Iceberg, eliminating data duplication and reducing storage costs by 32%. Built real-time Power BI dashboards accessing unified semantic layer, reducing report development time by 60%. Implemented CI/CD for data pipelines using GitHub Actions with automated schema validation and testing (75+ Great Expectations checks).
